scripts.dev:clean: powershell -Command "5000,5173,5174 | ForEach-Object { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }" && npm run dev
scripts.build:render: npm run install:all && npm run download:images --prefix server && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix server
scripts.start:render: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
